brief_summary_anonymized: Beverage major — 2026 brand platform tied to 'That's My Life' tagline + AFC football partnership.
strategic_insight: Today's youth are constantly pushed into things that don't reflect their real character. Performance-anxiety masks the real self.
execution_summary: Two-scene contrast: same place, same people — formal scene vs. real scene. The energy shifts when only the close ones remain. Product arrives at the moment of permission to be real.
what_made_it_work: Performance-vs-reality two-scene contrast is signature emotional architecture
AFC football integration: 'the game ends, the real stories begin'
what_would_NOT_transplant: Two-scene structure requires patience — fails in short formats
Authentic-self framing is wrong for premium / aspirational brands
